introSection: Fønix (Danish for Phoenix) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. The ride was manufactured by Vekoma and opened on 9 April 2022.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Fønix is the first Wildcat model from Vekoma.

fullText:
Fønix (Danish for Phoenix) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. The ride was manufactured by Vekoma and opened on 9 April 2022.

Fønix is the first Wildcat model from Vekoma.
